**Warehouse Associate - Dallas, TX - $18-22/hr**

Join our regional distribution center in Dallas, TX, where we focus on efficient picking and packing operations. We pride ourselves on maintaining a fast-paced environment that delivers quality service to our customers.

**Requirements:**
- 1+ year of experience in a warehouse setting
- Comfortable lifting up to 50 lbs
- Experience with RF scanners
- Basic computer skills for inventory tracking and reporting

**Nice to Have:**
- Forklift certification
- Experience with inventory management systems
- Previous experience in a fast-paced distribution environment

**Schedule Details:**
- Full-time positions available
- Shifts available: Day, Swing, and Night
- Overtime opportunities may be available based on workload

If you're ready to work hard and be part of a dedicated team, apply today!
